decisions.rationale: The observation describes the MTA logo and names 'Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)'. The registry record entity_mta-entity-update-2025 has display_name 'Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)', entity_type 'transit_authority', and acronym 'MTA', matching the parent authority level rather than the NYCT subsidiary.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA logo, consisting of the letters 'MTA' in white inside a black circle.

decisions.rationale: The observation describes 'New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)' with its logo, matching the registry record entity_nyc-dot which has entity_name 'New York City Department of Transportation' and entity_type 'agency'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The NEW YORK CITY DOT logo, featuring the text 'NEW YORK CITY' above 'DOT'

decisions.rationale: The observation identifies 'Manhattan Community Board 11' (CB11) via committee reference. The registry record entity_community-board-11-manhattan has entity_name 'Community Board 11, Manhattan', entity_type 'community board', and acronym 'CB11'. Source evidence shows 'CB11's Public Safety & Transportation Committee'.

The observation identifies 'BETTERBUSES' as an MTA bus priority program. The registry record entity_betterbuses-program-mar2025 has display_name 'BETTERBUSES', entity_type 'program', and description 'MTA bus priority program'. The source_id matches exactly (116_st_morningside_ave_pleasant_ave_cb11_mar2025).
